description:
The VelocityHapticFilter component is used to influence the haptics a user feels on a haptics device as the device moves through a HapticVolume at different speeds.

This works as part of the game's robust Haptics system.

fields.VelocitySmoothTime: How much to smooth the changes in velocity this component works with.
fields.StartIntensity: The intensity to use when a haptics device is moving at ``StartVelocity`` through a valid Component:HapticVolume on the same slot.
fields.EndIntensity: The intensity to use when a haptics device is moving at ``EndVelocity`` through a valid Component:HapticVolume on the same slot.
fields.Power: The multiplier of the haptics intensity before applying it.

usage: Attach to a slot with a valid and working HapticVolume to add to the list of multiplicative haptic filters.
